reviews.text: Kara was amazing to work with! We came from out of state and did our engagement pictures the day before our wedding. She had the perfect spot for our engagement pictures, and was able to capture every picture I had hoped for. She has an amazing personality that makes you feel comfortable, and a great mix of letting you be natural and telling you what to do. Our wedding day had a few hiccups but Kara was a key part in helping our day be absolutely perfect! Our wedding pictures turned our more beautiful and jaw dropping than I could have ever dreamed of! I cannot say enough good things about her and her work!! Kara truly made our day even more special, and her images allow us to relive our perfect day, everyday!

Kara is truly a gem, by far the best photographer I have ever worked with, and the best vendor we chose for our wedding. She truly made my husband and I feel at home from the get-to-know-you engagement shoot to the end of our wedding day. She was so helpful beyond just photos, helping me with my veil and other little things throughout our day. She is so kind and charismatic, and also incredibly organized and timely getting photos back. We knew exactly what to expect going into our big day due to plenty of lead up meetings and questionnaires! She did a wonderful job of capturing the day from start to finish. Her photos display the deep emotions of the day and she captured little unstaged moments which I really appreciated. She is bubbly, fun, and a wonderful photographer, I highly recommend her for your wedding photographer needs!

We had so much fun working with Kara for both our engagement photos and for our wedding. Not only is she the best photographer we’ve ever seen, but she is an incredibly kind, thoughtful, and funny human being. She continuously went above and beyond to make sure that she captured everything we wanted, to answer random wedding questions, and to ensure we didn’t miss a detail of all the important parts of the day. Kara is incredibly knowledgeable about everything you could need to know about planning for a wedding and is a supportive presence to have through the process and with identifying what you want for photos. She made us feel comfortable with taking pictures (something we both felt super nervous about), made the process of taking pictures fun and engaging, and she managed to genuinely capture all the love and joy of our moments together. She truly cares about her work and making sure that people have a joyous and meaningful experience, which shines through in the beautiful photos that she works so hard on. We would recommend Kara to anyone looking for amazing photography and an authentic and fun experience with their wedding photos!

Kara is an all around amazing human! I have much love for her and the work she does! I appreciate how personal she was with us from the start. I had other photographers feel stale, quick to throw a contract at me. Never once did I feel pressured about booking my date with her or feel uncomfortable at any point!

Kara was a big help to me with details for the day of. She has the questions and recommendations for things a bride can easily forget. Time got the best of me and I definitely appreciate that she took the time to ask questions and find out the details that were unique to us and what we wanted captured.

I honestly have nothing but great things to say about Kara! She was an absolute pleasure to work with before, day of and after!

She’s professional, friendly, caring, knowledgeable, talented, thoughtful, are just a few words that instantly come to mind!

Wedding Day it was like a having a friend show up to photograph us. Our family and friends were all impressed with Kara’s kindness! We already knew she is amazing! Can I mention I went to a wedding recently where the photographer was kinda mean. Never once did Kara yell or round up our guests like cattle. She spoke to everyone kindly and professionally! Much love girl you made me realize how truly lucky I was to have YOU capture my special day! I’m seriously tearing up writing this!  🥹

When I first saw my images I can’t stress enough how IMPRESSED I was and how she DELIVERED!! I show off my photos any chance I get 🙌🏽 I have the best engagement and wedding photos 😍. I am so in love with them and I will cherish them for years to come!

If you’re feeling “on the fence” about booking with Kara. She is worth every penny! The only regret I have is not having her stay the whole night but out of all our vendors I recommend her highly and FIRST. I would book her again immediately for any photos we will want down the road!

From the moment we had our first connect with Kara, we knew she was the perfect match for our wedding day. Leading up to the wedding she sent us emails with tips/recommendations for the big day, and as it got closer sent us an incredibly thorough survey to ensure she didn't miss any big moments on our special day. She has an amazing ability to capture candid moments with us and our guests and also spot opportune places for stunning photos with nature in the backdrop and foreground of our photos, something we didn't see in any other photographers portfolios. We received a sneak peak of our photos the next day and they were better than we could've imagined. Our experience with Kara was a 10/10!
